The '''''Rodrigo Andrera''''' was a minesweeper craft tasked with dismantling the [[Palpatine Mine Network]] sometime after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. After an accident, only two crew members were found alive aboard the vessel, one of whom was [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]].<ref name="Travel Book" />
